message:
🐛 Fix sidebar and improve route selection in customizer

- Revert sidebar dropdown back to customizable dynamic nav list
- Add route selection dropdown in SidebarCustomizer with descriptions
- Known routes grouped by category (Core Dashboards, Applications, etc.)
- Each route shows name, path, and description of what it does
- Routes already in sidebar are marked as "Added" and disabled
- Custom URL option still available for manual entry
- Note displayed explaining routes must be compiled artifacts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
